---
title: "DARIAH Annual Event 2026"
date: 2026-05-26
author: "DARIAH ERIC"
author-title: "Organizer"
description: "NAIF participates in the DARIAH Annual Event in Rome (26-29 May 2026), where Dr Moritz Mähr presents a poster on Track 1 and Track 4."
other-links:
  - text: "Related post: NAIF at DARIAH Annual Event 2026"
    href: "../../posts/2026-07-20-naif-at-dariah-annual-event-2026/"
categories:
  - "Participation by NAIF"
tags:
  - "DARIAH"
  - "Conference"
  - "Digital humanities"
proofread: false
image: "images/dariah-annual-event-2026.png"
image-alt: "Homepage visual for the DARIAH Annual Event 2026 in Rome"
image-caption: "Screenshot of the DARIAH Annual Event 2026 homepage. Source: https://annualevent.dariah.eu/. Rights: DARIAH ERIC; site content licensed under CC BY where noted."
toc: true
---

<!-- Source: <https://annualevent.dariah.eu/> -->

::: {.callout-note}
This event has already taken place. Any registration information has been disabled and is shown for reference only.
:::

## Details

- Date: 26-29 May 2026
- Location: Universita degli Studi Roma Tre - Dipartimento di Studi Umanistici, Via Ostiense 234, Rome, Italy
- Registration: ~~Registration closed~~
- Call for papers: <https://annualevent.dariah.eu/call-for-papers/>
- Event page: <https://annualevent.dariah.eu/>
- NAIF participation: Dr Moritz Mähr presents a poster on Track 1 and Track 4.

## About

The DARIAH Annual Event 2026 focuses on "Digital Arts and Humanities With and For Society: Building Infrastructures of Engagement". The event brings together researchers and practitioners from arts, humanities, cultural heritage, and information sciences to exchange work on digitally enabled research and collaboration.

The programme includes DARIAH internal meetings on 26 May and the main conference from 27 to 29 May.

NAIF is represented by Dr Moritz Mähr, who presents a poster covering Track 1 and Track 4.
